overview.tagline: An exclusive, family-oriented borough with top schools and a serene suburban lifestyle
overview.description: Old Tappan is an affluent residential borough in northern Bergen County, known for its excellent schools, spacious properties, and quiet, family-centered lifestyle. With a population of about 5,900, Old Tappan maintains a low-density, suburban character with generous lot sizes and well-manicured neighborhoods. The borough is part of the highly regarded Northern Valley Regional High School District and borders New York State to the north. Old Tappan offers a premium residential experience for families who value top-tier education, safety, and a close-knit community.
overview.schoolDistrict: Old Tappan Public Schools / Northern Valley Regional
highlights: Part of the top-ranked Northern Valley Regional High School District
Spacious lots with upscale homes and manicured properties
Very low crime rate and family-friendly environment
Easy access to Garden State Parkway and Palisades Interstate Parkway

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. Bergen County conducts periodic revaluations. Old Tappan features predominantly single-family homes on generous lots.
realEstate.recentTrends: Old Tappan's market is strong and competitive, driven by the Northern Valley school district and the borough's residential prestige. Home prices have appreciated significantly. Demand outpaces supply, and well-maintained homes often receive multiple offers. New luxury construction has added to the housing stock.
neighborhoodNotes: Old Tappan Road corridor — Central borough road with established colonial and newer homes
Westwood Avenue area — Upscale properties with spacious yards
DeWolf Road section — Premium homes with larger lots near the NY border
Orangeburgh Road area — Newer development with modern amenities
Rivervale Road border — Properties near the River Vale line with easy highway access

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash collection provided by a contracted hauler.
details: Trash pickup occurs twice per week
Containers at curbside by 6:00 AM
Maximum 50 lbs per container with secure lids
Bulk item pickup by scheduling with DPW
Holiday schedule posted on borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Curbside recycling collected on a regular schedule.
details: Commingled recyclables collected biweekly
Paper and cardboard on alternate weeks
Yard waste collected seasonally from spring through fall
Recycling containers provided by the Borough
Special recycling events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water is provided by Veolia Water (formerly United Water). Sewer service through the Borough and Northwest Bergen County Utilities Authority.
details: Veolia Water handles water supply and billing
Sewer maintained by the Borough and NBCUA
Some areas served by private wells and/or septic systems
Annual water quality reports available
Emergency water service available 24/7

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, zoning, and code enforcement.
details: Permits required for all construction, additions, and renovations
Zoning Board and Planning Board meet monthly
Applications available at Borough Hall
Inspections coordinated through the Building Department
Certificate of occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Parking regulations are enforced on borough streets.
details: Street parking subject to posted restrictions
No overnight parking on borough streets without permit
Snow emergency parking rules in effect during storms
Parking near schools subject to additional restrictions during school hours
Violations subject to fines

additionalServices.title: Old Tappan Free Public Library
additionalServices.description: Community library serving residents with books, programs, and resources.
details: Located at 227 Old Tappan Road
Children's story times, teen programs, and adult events
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Year-round programs for residents of all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues, summer camps, and swim programs
Adult fitness and senior programs
Community pool open to residents in summer
Special events throughout the year

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Old Tappan enforces strict noise regulations to preserve its quiet residential character.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 7:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Leaf blowers and power equipment restricted to specific hours
Loud music and amplified sound prohibited after 10:00 PM

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Properties must be maintained to high standards consistent with the borough's residential character.
keyRules: Lawns and landscaping must be kept well-maintained
Properties must be free of debris, junk, and unsightly conditions
Structures must be maintained in good repair and appearance
Sidewalks and driveways must be cleared of snow promptly
Swimming pools must be properly fenced and maintained

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Pet owners must comply with licensing and control requirements.
keyRules: Dogs must be licensed annually
Dogs must be on a leash at all times when off owner's property
Pet waste must be cleaned up immediately
Barking dogs subject to noise complaints and fines
Maximum number of pets per household may apply

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking rules are enforced to maintain the borough's residential streetscape.
keyRules: Overnight parking on streets prohibited from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM
Vehicles must be moved during snow emergencies
No parking on lawns or unpaved surfaces
Commercial vehicles restricted from residential streets overnight
Violations subject to fines and towing

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must comply with borough requirements.
keyRules: Rental properties must be registered with the Borough
Certificate of habitability required before occupancy
Properties must meet all code standards
Short-term rentals subject to zoning restrictions
Landlords responsible for tenant compliance with borough ordinances

other.title: Fence and Pool Regulations
other.summary: Fences and swimming pools are regulated for safety and aesthetics.
keyRules: Fences limited to 6 feet in rear yards and 4 feet in front yards
Swimming pools must be enclosed with a minimum 4-foot fence with self-closing gate
Pool permits required from the Building Department
Fence installations require a permit
other.source: Borough of Old Tappan Zoning Code

schools.publicDistrict: Old Tappan Public Schools / Northern Valley Regional High School District

publicSchools.name: Charles DeWolf Middle School
publicSchools.notes: Borough's sole PreK-8 school, consistently ranked among the best in Bergen County

publicSchools.name: Northern Valley Regional High School at Old Tappan
publicSchools.notes: Regional high school consistently ranked among New Jersey's top public high schools; strong academics, athletics, and extracurriculars

nearbyHigherEd: Ramapo College of New Jersey (Mahwah) — 12 miles

whyMoveHere: Top-ranked Northern Valley Regional High School at Old Tappan
Spacious lots and upscale residential properties
Very safe community with extremely low crime rate
Proximity to Garden State Parkway and Palisades Interstate Parkway

commuteToNYC.notes: NJ Transit bus service provides connections to Port Authority Bus Terminal. Many residents drive to nearby Pascack Valley Line train stations in Westwood or Park Ridge for rail service to Hoboken. The Garden State Parkway and Palisades Interstate Parkway provide direct highway access to the George Washington Bridge.

costOfLiving.summary: Old Tappan is an affluent community with higher home prices reflecting the premium school district and residential quality.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Well above the state average for housing costs

pros: Outstanding public schools at both the local and regional levels
Spacious, well-maintained properties with large yards
Extremely safe community with very low crime
Strong property values and consistent appreciation
Family-friendly atmosphere with active recreation programs
cons: High home prices — one of the more expensive Bergen County communities
Very limited commercial activity and dining options
No train station in the borough — reliant on bus or driving to nearby stations
Higher property taxes in absolute terms
Quiet community with limited nightlife or entertainment

restaurants.name: Old Tappan Manor
restaurants.description: Elegant event venue and restaurant offering American and Italian cuisine for special occasions.
restaurants.address: 137 Old Tappan Road, Old Tappan, NJ

restaurants.name: River Palm Terrace
restaurants.description: Upscale steakhouse known for premium cuts, seafood, and an extensive wine list.
restaurants.address: Old Tappan Road, Old Tappan, NJ

restaurants.name: Harvest Bistro & Bar
restaurants.description: Farm-to-table American restaurant with seasonal menus and craft cocktails.
restaurants.address: Old Tappan Road, Old Tappan, NJ

parks.name: Old Tappan Community Park
parks.description: Central park with sports fields, playground, walking trails, and community pool.

parks.name: Oakes Overlook Park
parks.description: Scenic park with walking paths, benches, and nature areas.

parks.name: Lake DeForest (nearby)
parks.description: Large reservoir on the border of Old Tappan and Clarkstown, NY offering scenic walking paths along the shore.
parks.address: Old Tappan Road, Old Tappan, NJ

events.name: Old Tappan Day
events.description: Annual community celebration with food vendors, live music, games, rides, and family entertainment.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community tree lighting ceremony with caroling, refreshments, and holiday cheer.

events.name: Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Borough ceremony honoring veterans with a community gathering.

events.name: Easter Egg Hunt
events.description: Annual egg hunt for borough children at the community park.

attractions.name: Lake DeForest
attractions.description: Scenic reservoir providing walking paths and nature observation along the New York/New Jersey border.

attractions.name: Historic Old Tappan
attractions.description: The borough has roots dating to Dutch colonial settlement, with several historic homes and landmarks throughout the community.

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Tuesday of each month at 7:30 PM
government.meetingLocation: Old Tappan Borough Hall, 227 Old Tappan Road

police.address: 227 Old Tappan Road, Old Tappan, NJ 07675

hospitals.name: Valley Hospital
hospitals.address: 223 North Van Dien Avenue, Ridgewood, NJ 07450
